sections.sectionTitle: Phatna tawh Biakna leh Pasian' Huh Baih ding Ngetna

verses.text: Topa lamenin ka ngak ngiungeu a, amah kei lam hong nga-in ka kikona aw hong za hi
Dahna dum sung, buannawng panin kei hong kaikhia-in suangpi tungah ka khete nga a, ka khesikna mun a muan'huaisak hi
Eima Pasian phatna la thak keimah hong hilh hi. Mi tampite in hih thu mu-in amah zahtak ding uh a, amaute khempeuh in Topa muang ding uh hi
Topa a muang a, mi kiphasakte lamah a kiheilo, pasian manlote lamah a pialkhialo mi thupha ngah ahi hi
Topa ka Pasian aw, na sep a lamdangte leh ko-a' dingin na ngaihsutnate tampi tak na phasak a, kuamah dang tawh tehtheih na hi kei hi. Tuate pulakin gen ding hi leng, genkhit zawh ding hilo hi
Gan gawh biakna leh khawhsa tawh biakna na deih kei a, khua ka zak theihna ding bil na hong guan' hi. Meihal biakna leh mawhmaina ding biakna zong na kulsak kei hi
Tua ciangin keimah in, “En in, laibu sungah keima thu a kigelh khinsa bangin ka hong pai hi
Nangma deih bang hihna-ah nuam ka sa hi, ka Pasian aw. Nangma thukham ka lung sungah om hi,” ka ci hi
Hotkhiatna hangin lungdam thu mihonpi lakah ka gen ding hi. Topa aw, lungdam thugen ka khawl ngei kei ding hi
Nangma hotkhiatna thu ka im kei a, na thumanna leh na hotkhiatna ka gen khin hi. Na itna kip leh na thumanna mihonpi tungah ka im kei hi
Topa aw, na hehpihna kei kiang panin humcip kei in la, na itna kip leh na thumanna kei a hong kem tawntung ding hisak ta in

Bang hang hiam cih leh a malin simzawh lohding siatna tampite in kei hong umcih a, khua a hong musak theilo zah dong dingin ka mawhna thaman ka thuak khinta hi. Amaute ka sam mal sangin tamzaw uh a, ka lung in a lel ta hi
Topa aw, keimah hong honkhia nuam in. Topa aw, hong huh meng in
Kei a hong that nuamte zahhuaisak in la, maisiasak in. Keima siatna ding a deihte nungkiksak in la minsiasak in
Keima tungah, “Ha ha!” hong ci vialte zahhuaina tawh maikhingsak in
Ahih hangin nang a hong zongte khempeuh nangma hangin nuamin kipak hen la, na hotkhiat ding a deihte in, “ Topa lian hi!” ci ngitnget ta uh hen
Kei ahih leh zawngin ka cimawh a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong mangngilhlo hi. Nang pen kei hong huhpa leh hong honkhiapa na hi hi. Zekai kei in, ka Pasian aw.
